AI-written, professionally typeset

Turn your expertise into a professional ebook in about an hour

Describe the topic. InkMagnet researches it on the web, writes every chapter with verifiable sources, designs the cover and delivers a print-quality PDF and EPUB. No templates, no docx exports — real book typesetting.

Start your book See how it works
  • Print-quality PDF + EPUB
  • Web research with cited sources
  • One fixed price per book
PDF · EPUB

From topic to finished book in four steps

You make the decisions. The pipeline does the work.

  1. 1

    Describe your book

    Topic, audience, language, target length, visual style. A title is optional — InkMagnet can propose one.

  2. 2

    Approve the structure

    The engine researches your topic on the live web, then drafts a chapter-by-chapter outline. You edit or approve it.

  3. 3

    AI writes and designs

    Every chapter is written, reviewed and typeset with professional book software. Optional AI illustrations are matched to your content.

  4. 4

    Download and publish

    You get a press-ready PDF and a store-ready EPUB, with a designed cover. Edit any chapter in the built-in editor and recompile anytime.

Unretouched pages from a generated book

Below: raw, 1:1 pages exported straight from a book created with InkMagnet. No mockups, no Photoshop.

Pages rendered from the actual PDF of a book generated in the app.

What makes the books worth reading

Most AI book tools produce a long blog post in a PDF wrapper. InkMagnet builds actual books.

Real web research

Before a single chapter is written, the engine researches your topic online and grounds the content in current, verifiable sources.

Professional typesetting

Books are compiled with LaTeX — the system behind academic publishing. Proper margins, running heads, hyphenation, a clickable table of contents.

AI illustrations that fit

Optional photographic or illustrated artwork generated per chapter, matched to your topic, language and region — included in the price.

Designed covers

A cover is generated with your title, palette and layout of choice. Adjust it in the cover editor whenever you like.

Your edits are sacred

Rewrite any chapter in the WYSIWYG editor. Regenerations never overwrite what you changed by hand.

PDF + EPUB, ready to sell

A print-quality PDF and a valid EPUB for Kindle, Apple Books or your store. No watermarks, full commercial rights.

One panel for every book you make

Covers, progress, downloads — the real dashboard, exactly as you'll see it.

app.inkmagnet.com

Built for people who need books that work

Lead magnets

A substantial, branded ebook converts better than a two-page checklist. Ship one per campaign.

Course creators

Package your curriculum as a companion book your students can keep.

Coaches & consultants

A book with your name on the cover is still the strongest credibility asset there is.

Agencies

Deliver client ebooks in days instead of weeks, at a fraction of a ghostwriter's fee.

One price per book. Nothing recurring.

Pay only when you create a book. Research, writing, illustrations, cover, PDF and EPUB — everything is included.

One price per book. Nothing recurring.
Compact 30–45 pages $9.99 per book
Standard 46–75 pages $12.99 per book
Extended 76–115 pages $14.99 per book
Comprehensive 116–160 pages $17.99 per book
Complete 161–200 pages $19.99 per book

Full commercial rights. Unlimited edits and recompiles of every book you've bought.

Create your first book

Frequently asked questions

Who owns the books I create?

You do. Every book comes with full commercial rights — sell it, give it away as a lead magnet, publish it under your name.

How long does it take?

Structure is ready for your review within minutes. A complete book — written, illustrated, typeset and compiled — typically takes under an hour.

Which languages are supported?

You pick the book's language when you create the project. English and Polish are fully supported today, including language-aware typography and hyphenation.

Can I edit the content?

Yes. Every chapter is editable in a built-in WYSIWYG editor, and your manual edits are never overwritten by later regenerations. Recompile the PDF and EPUB as often as you like.

Is the content original?

Each book is written from scratch for your specific topic, audience and instructions, grounded in live web research with cited sources. No two books are alike.

What exactly do I download?

A print-quality PDF (with a designed cover, clickable table of contents and professional typesetting) plus an EPUB that works on Kindle, Apple Books, Kobo and in ebook stores.

Your book is one form away

Describe the topic today, download the finished ebook within the hour.

Start writing — from $9.99
